title: Living in Boulder vlog 5 - 26 - 2017: Classical Greek Books

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs late at night about his internet outage being fixed (broken motor on the modem), a family dinner with his mom and brothers, and his main focus: building out a website cataloging classical books from the ancient/Western world, particularly works related to Rome (Mommsen, theater, buildings of Rome), with excitement about his faster internet allowing rapid progress on the project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited about faster speeds enabling quicker video uploads and website work
very enthusiastic, wants to catalog every surviving book from the Western world up to around 700 AD
really enjoyed them, especially the nut sauce dipping sauce

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle ran out of internet because his motor broke and had to wait for a new one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle picked up the new motor from the hardware store and hooked up his internet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The lady at the hardware store said the new motor would provide faster internet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle uploaded a video after fixing his internet and is excited to see how it works.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's mom came by and took the old motor to the UPS place to send it back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's mom invited him over for dinner with his brother.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: They had Trader Joe's wraps with veggies and nut sauce for dinner.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle offered to let his brother borrow his motorbike because Ridgeway, Colorado is a great place for motorbiking.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle needs to sell his van, and someone was interested last week but didn't call back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's video battery died, and then his memory card filled up, delaying his video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle had to fix a metal thing that holds the curtains up in his van.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle has been archiving books from the classic world and wants to add photos of them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle rebuilt the book 'The Rainbow Crystal' and is working on other classic books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is compiling a collection of buildings from the realm and wants to publish it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is building menus for his website and organizing books by name.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's fast computer is helping him archive books quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle aims to have every book from the Western world up until 700 AD archived in two weeks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is excited to finish his project and might jump into it soon.
